scripts.build:js: bunx terser assets/js/side-cart.js -o assets/js/side-cart.min.js -c -m && bunx terser assets/js/cross-sells.js -o assets/js/cross-sells.min.js -c -m && bunx terser assets/js/admin.js -o assets/js/admin.min.js -c -m
scripts.build:css: bunx clean-css-cli -o assets/css/side-cart.min.css assets/css/side-cart.css && bunx clean-css-cli -o assets/css/admin.min.css assets/css/admin.css
scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:css
